mapper.select: SELECT p.id , p.name , p.contents , p.isAdmin , p.views , p.userId , p.categoryId , p.createdAt , p.updatedAt , f.id AS fileId , f.path , f.name AS fileName , f.extension FROM post p LEFT JOIN file f ON f.postId = p.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id , p.name , p.contents , p.isAdmin , p.views , p.userId , p.categoryId , p.createdAt , p.updatedAt , f.id AS fileId , f.path , f.name AS fileName , f.extension FROM post p LEFT JOIN file f ON f.postId = p.id WHERE userId = #{userId}
